commentaries.author: Cyril of Jerusalem
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the priest that is anointed shall take of the bullock's blood, and bring it to the tabernacle of meeting: Cyril of Jerusalem He is called by two names, Jesus Christ; Jesus because he is a savior, Christ because he is a priest. With this in mind the divinely inspired prophet Moses gave these two titles to two men eminent above all, changing the name of his own successor in the sovereignty, Auses, to Jesus, and giving his own brother, Aaron, the surname Christ, that through these two chosen men he might represent at once the high priesthood and the kingship of the one Jesus Christ who was to come.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: The blood. As the figure of the blood of Christ shed for the remission of our sins; and carried by him into the sanctuary of heaven.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: The blood: As the figure of the blood of Christ shed for the remission of our sins, and carried by him into the sanctuary of heaven.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
